title: Battle of Noquivzor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
{{Battle
|prev=[[Battle of Mrisst (6 ABY)|Battle of Mrisst]]<ref name="Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>

|name=Battle of Noquivzor
|conflict=[[Core Campaign]], [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
|date=[[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]<ref name="ABY Date">The [[Mission above Imperial City|departure]] of the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' states occurs in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], happens between 7-8 weeks after the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]]. Per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', the Liberation occurs on 42:2:17, so the ''Lusankya''{{'s}} departure is approximately 42:4:17. Per ''Warfare''{{'s}} placement of the [[Battle of Selaggis]] in 7 ABY, the Atlas's placement of Selaggis on 43:2:28, and the Atlas's placement of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in 35:3, a three-month gap between the [[Great ReSynchronization]] and [[Galactic Standard Calendar]] can be confirmed. Thus, the Liberation, which occurs on 42:2:17, occurs before the year 7 ABY begins, and must fall in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. The same can be said for the remainder of the [[Core Campaign]] that occurs prior to the Liberation.</ref> (42:1:30)<ref name="Atlas" />
|place=[[Noquivzor]]<ref name="Gamble" />
|result=Zsinj victory<ref name="Gamble" />

{{Quote|You have the basics: one standard day ago Warlord Zsinj showed up in the system with the ''Iron Fist'', launched a wing of TIEs, and proceeded with a planetary bombardment. Our base there was hit hard, though since most of it was underground, the damage was not as extensive as Zsinj undoubtedly would like to think.|[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], to [[Borsk Fey'lya]]|<ref name="Gamble" />}}
The [[Zsinj's Empire|forces]] of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] executed a '''hit-and-fade strike''' against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forward base on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Noquivzor]]. The attack was carried out by Zsinj, aboard his [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] in response to the recent [[Second Battle of Borleias|capture]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] as well as the [[Battle of Mrisst (6 ABY)|loss]] of two of his armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], it was too late to do catastrophic damage, as most of the New Republic forces had either already withdrawn from the planet or had relocated to installations on other parts of that world.

The warlord was successful in demolishing a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Technician/Legends|mechanics']] barracks building that had been assigned to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]; initially it was believed that [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] was killed in the attack, having thought to be living there at the time. The ''Iron Fist'', however, fled before reinforcements could arrive.
